item.title: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Agriculture & Natural Resources.

item.title: 👍Erik Kamrath - Natural Resources Defense Council
item.description: Erik Kamrath signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Natural Resources Defense Council.

item.title: 👍charlotte furner - nobody
item.description: charlotte furner signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent nobody.

item.description: Dan Holmes signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Atlas Agro.

item.title: 👍💵Seth Worley - Government Affairs Director, UA Plumbers & Steamfitters Local 598
item.description: Seth Worley signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Government Affairs Director, UA Plumbers & Steamfitters Local 598. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Kelly McLain - Washington State Dept. of Agriculture
item.description: Kelly McLain signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Dept. of Agriculture.

item.title: 👍Cassie Losey - Port of Benton
item.description: Cassie Losey signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Port of Benton.

item.title: 👍💵Mark Streuli - Washington Potato Commission
item.description: Mark Streuli signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Potato Commission. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Phyllis Farrell signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent League of Women Voters of Washington.

item.title: 👍Reagan Grabner - CSS Farms
item.description: Reagan Grabner signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent CSS Farms.
